title: The Little Warrior
description: A tiny adventurer in a striped tunic stands guard beside his campfire, sword drawn and staff in hand. Hand-sculpted and painted with fine detail.

title: Mushroom Friends
description: A pair of whimsical mushroom characters with delicate painted faces. One wears a golden cap, the other a classic red-and-white polka-dot toadstool hat.

title: Jester Bowl
description: A small hand-shaped ceramic bowl with an organic wavy rim, glazed in bold stripes of pink, amber, and deep green.

title: Botanical Coil Cup
description: A coil-built ceramic cup with a playful curled handle, adorned with hand-painted leaf sprigs and a vine-patterned rim.

title: Rose Bud Mug
description: A warm-toned ceramic mug decorated with delicate painted leaves and wildflowers, finished with a tiny sculpted rose bud perched on the handle.

title: Little Stegosaurus
description: A palm-sized green stegosaurus with a cheeky pink smile and a row of tiny back plates. Hand-sculpted and painted in soft green tones.

title: WALL-E & Plant
description: The lovable robot WALL-E painted on a smooth river stone, holding his precious plant in a boot. Big blue binocular eyes full of curiosity.

title: Johnny 5 Portrait
description: A close-up portrait of WALL-E painted on stone, capturing his expressive mechanical eyes and gentle personality in careful brushwork.
